title: Nebropsis glabra
taxonomy: Nebropsis glabra is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the tribe Phaseoleae and the subfamily Faboideae. The genus Nebropsis is part of the larger clade of legumes. Nebropsis glabra is native to tropical Africa and is commonly found in savannas and grasslands. The plant is known for its ability to fix nitrogen in the soil, making it an important part of its ecosystem.
